Wind
In west, variable 2 to 4, becoming southeast 6 to gale 8 later. In east, southeasterly 6 to gale 8, decreasing 5 for a time.

In west, moderate or rough. in east, moderate or rough, occasionally very rough at first.
Weather
In west, showers. In east, sleet then fair.
Visibility
In west, good. In east, poor becoming good.
